status_legend.in_progress: 这个功能是当前唯一正在进行的任务。
status_legend.blocked: 因为已记录的阻塞问题，当前无法继续推进。
status_legend.passing: 要求的验证已经通过，并且证据已经记录。

features.title: 隐藏聊天区标题栏
features.user_visible_behavior: 将聊天区标题栏默认隐藏，鼠标靠近时展开显示
verification: 聊天区标题栏隐藏，鼠标靠近时显示
单元测试，集成测试，e2e测试通过
evidence: ChatPanel.jsx: isHeaderHovered state + chat-header-hover-trigger zone + chat-header-visible class toggle on mouseEnter/mouseLeave
components.chat-panel.css: .chat-header defaults to opacity:0/visibility:hidden, .chat-panel:hover .chat-header shows via opacity:1/visibility:visible, .chat-header-visible forces visible
Unit tests: 140/140 passing (incl. ChatPanelHeaderHideShow.test.js 5 tests for hidden-by-default/show-on-hover/hide-on-leave/trigger-zone/click-while-hidden)
E2E tests: 29/29 passing (Playwright, incl. chat header toggle tests with hover-to-reveal)

features.title: 模型配置兼容anthropic协议
features.user_visible_behavior: 支持在模型设置中设置anthropic协议的url，通过anthropic客户端发送请求
verification: 根据url格式自动判断协议(openAI/anthropic)，选择对应客户端进行转发
API请求中的msg显示要对应当前使用协议的格式
单元测试，集成测试，e2e测试通过
evidence: apiClient.js: detectProtocol auto-detects protocol from URL (returns 'anthropic' if URL contains anthropic, else 'openai')

apiClient.js: sendChatRequest builds protocol-specific requests - OpenAI: /chat/completions with Bearer auth; Anthropic: /messages with x-api-key header, anthropic-version: 2023-06-01, max_tokens: 4096
apiClient.js: protocol-specific SSE parsing - OpenAI: line-by-line choices[0].delta with reasoning_content/content; Anthropic: event-delimited content_block_delta with text_delta/thinking_delta
ChatPanelRenderers.js: renderApiRequestDisplay accepts protocol param and shows api-protocol-badge (OpenAI/Anthropic)
ChatPanel.jsx: uses window.detectProtocol and window.sendChatRequest, stores lastApiRequestProtocol for display
index.html: apiClient.js script loaded before ChatPanel.js for proper dependency order
Unit tests: 158/158 passing (incl. 18 new: apiClient.detect.test.js 7 tests, apiClient.request.test.js 7 tests, apiClient.display.test.js 4 tests)
E2E tests: 29/29 passing (1 flaky pre-existing test unrelated to app-002)
